item.title: All I have to offer are my recycled memes, phone dump#2
item.description:
I do not have a job right now, and it has been very humbling that I have been having so much trouble locking one down. I thought i had a few things in my pocket that haven't ended up working out well, and doordash isn't providing a flood of money... I'm behind and getting nervous. Have been waiting for a callback to see if i can be rehired at a previous job for more than I was making before, and it was something I woukd be happy to be able to do again, so keep your fingers crossed for me!!
This has helped me to think of it differently, to be less annoyed when my social battery is burnt out and I don't feel like having the same repeat conversations with people. Still pretty annoying tho.
Me me meeeee. "Solitude is dangerous. It is very addictive. It becomes a habit after you realize how peaceful and calm it is. It's like you don't want to deal with other people anymore because they drain your energy." -Jim Carrey But on the other hand people are love. People can surprise you and be thoughtful and I don't know what i would have done without their help picking me back up at times. Being around people's differences are one of the ways we best grow, and it shows us things we may not have experienced otherwise. Some of my favorite things to do/foods to eat are things I had never thought to try on my own.
Been doordashing and came across this irl. Thought it was funny enough to send to friend
Just cool, dark, pretty. Made me stop and screenshot. Maybe someone else will like it too.
Or lizard kisses/cow kisses. If you do not know what these are I can provide a demonstration. Just give me your face.
If you have poured your heart out, that is all you can do. Once you've said all that you could, with your heart and soul twined into the words and they still don't hear you, well then you could explain it 100 more times and they wouldn't understand it any better. So do talk, do say it, but know that you are expressing what you need, for you and your feelings, to know you tried all you could before you can let go. ---advice i gave a friend recently... it made sense to me
This had to just be for the lolz cause...wow...
Do it.
Same. The freedom feels like the best high at first though, when I'm being manic.
Yep
*siiiigh*..... I have found more enjoyment in the small moments, as I have gotten older, out of necessity.
What a ride it is. Like a death coaster.
I do too. Have this big HUGE dark circle ring bruise on the underside of my thigh and have NO IDEA how I got it????
Sooo tired.... all the time....but idk if it's the depression or if I'm just lazy and like being comfy
Yup. Trying to glue it back together with gold in the cracks like that Japanese pottery... but all I have is this glue gun and I've burned myself and the glue isn't holding
Log dog
Some of these are dark...
It will be ok... It has to be...if i just keep trying...
For real, if we are so worried about saving money, why continue to ignore this huge profitable industry that hasn't had negative effects in the states it has all ready been legalized in, and all the money we spend criminalizing it and incarcerating people. (I'm in a very red state but it's legal all around me) I'd happily pay a the sin tax or whatever to buy it legally.
Would work on me for sure
Fair
I just love this so much
The way my brother refuses to let me turn the thermostat up in the winter cause he likes to live like a goddamn polar bear... come in motivated to clean the house or something, end up bundled up and huddled on the couch under a blanket.
The videos look weird, how they loaded, so I will be pleasantly surprised if they upload just fine when I post this. It's been a while
Done and done
Some days, man
For years I've had no idea what she actually does, besides be an absolute badass
This is just asking for too much.
Oh, shit.... I have gotten to the end, and taken time to comment my random thoughts to mark your trail along the way, and have forgotten the most important part, the pup tax, I totally look forward to any opportunity to show off my best friend!... so I will owe double pup tax on the next one, cause when I get in the zone with clicking the memes in my gallery I just space it by the end for some reason.
item.dc:creator: hugyourhedgehog

item.title: June 6, 1944
item.description: The D-Day operation of June 6, 1944, brought together the land, air, and sea forces of the allied armies in what became known as the largest amphibious invasion in military history. The operation, given the codename OVERLORD, delivered five naval assault divisions to the beaches of Normandy, France.

item.title: The Idiots of Imgur: A Double Dump pt 216
item.description: Why the double dump, you ask? I’m going on vacation to Japan for the next couple weeks and I’m not going to kid myself into thinking that I’ll remember to post. Feel free to keep tagging me anytime, just know it might take me even longer than usual to get back to everyone. Hope you all have a great weekend and I’ll see you for the next mini dump later this month!

item.title: What Happened Today #126
item.description: Today was surely when flood the zone turned into throw ketchup at the wall. While Trump and Musk's public meltdown dominated headlines, the real story was happening in the shadows: systematically breaking government services so basic they can't even answer tax questions, threatening election officials for following state law, and weaponizing immigration against college students who dare to protest. But their tantrum revealed that they're falling apart, losing in courts across the country, and failing at prosecutions they thought would be slam dunks. Their chaos isn't strength, it's desperation, and while they're busy throwing food fights, 1,000 communities are organizing No Kings protests to show them what real power looks like. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-war-continue 2. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-call-china 3. https://go.govbrief.today/us-sanctions-icc-judges 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-musk-blowup 5. https://go.govbrief.today/tax-credit-excludes-millions 6. https://go.govbrief.today/sba-leave-sanctuary-city 7. https://go.govbrief.today/catholic-transgender-blocks 8. https://go.govbrief.today/yurok-tribal-lands 9. https://go.govbrief.today/hs-mascot-ban 10. https://go.govbrief.today/gabbard-aide-ig-office 11. https://go.govbrief.today/quiet-skies-ended 12. https://go.govbrief.today/national-airport-parade 13. https://go.govbrief.today/raskin-warns-hegseth 14. https://go.govbrief.today/bondi-florida-bar 15. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-lies-biden 16. https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-firings-over-friends 17. https://go.govbrief.today/soliman-118-counts 18. https://go.govbrief.today/military-arrest-acquittal 19. https://go.govbrief.today/highschooler-granted-bail 20. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-blocks-chung-detention 21. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-visa-students 22. https://go.govbrief.today/americorps-grants-restored 23. https://go.govbrief.today/irs-taxpayer-calls 24. https://go.govbrief.today/biden-doctor-subpoena 25. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-straight-discrimination 26. https://go.govbrief.today/jean-pierre-book 27. https://go.govbrief.today/bedminster-health-violations Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/inexperienced-terrorism-prevention Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/no-kings-map Subscribe Free & Private - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Movie Memes Vol 2
item.description: I'm picking back up where I left off clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. Hope you all enjoyed, as always I'll post the links to my previous posts by category below for anyone who's interested. Star Wars Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/SVzbsKr Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/agPBjZY Part 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/3WbYPiO Part 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/D3xLtoh Part 5: https://imgur.com/gallery/hOagKbC Lord of the Rings https://imgur.com/gallery/YrdND58 Marvel https://imgur.com/gallery/J243dDD Harry Potter https://imgur.com/gallery/FCOoDNo Disney https://imgur.com/gallery/VFswkF4 Anime https://imgur.com/gallery/4oTHG6o Gaming Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/tgBY85X Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/dQN08Rs Part 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/uZJkc2E Part 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/zo8IFb1 Musical Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/JiwKewf Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/t16zecY Animals Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/P0cGACu Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/2ohYMNV Part 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/9i0lkoD Part 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/0wD3uKa Workplace Memes Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/8DXcQeO Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/POhPf2K Cartoon Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/8zdPMGx Movie Memes: https://imgur.com/gallery/16yzhY0
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps

item.title: The 515th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 5
item.description:
▲ This is what Bi Erasure is. ▲ It's not Biphobia. ▲ (As a Bisexual who is attracted more to women than to men, I'm often told that specifying that is "Bi-Erasure". It's not, it's being specific. I'm still Bi.) As someone who has respect for the few rules of the English language that do exist, I absolutely despise when people call bigotry against a group of people a "phobia". It's not a phobia, it's hate. Calling it a phobia makes it sound like a medical/clinical issue when it isn't. It's an educational/moral issue. -misia or -mesia are the correct suffixes Homomisia, Transmisia, Bimisia.
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk.
Venus
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: Andrew Toles has not played major league baseball since 2018, yet the Los Angeles Dodgers renew his contract every spring...
item.description: Outfielder Andrew Toles, 31, has not played in the majors since 2018. He's been on the restricted list since March 2019 because of mental health issues. He has since been diagnosed with bipolar disorder and Schizophrenia. There's no reason to believe he'll ever take another swing, for the Dodgers or anyone else. Nevertheless, the Dodgers have continued to renew his contract each spring so that he maintains his health insurance. It's a shockingly decent act in an industry that too often loses touch with humanity.
item.dc:creator: 2shots2beers

item.title: A slice of apple pie costs $1.50 in the Bahamas, $1.75 in Grenada, $1.45 in Jamaica and $2.25 in Barbados. These are the pie rates of the Caribbean.

Man Tax: Phoenix Raei “In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity” ― Albert Einstein I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go and find something that you do like. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server so you guys can donate memes to the museum for future CCC posts. I don't want to run out! Also, we can hang out. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ @graehall I did the thing.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: June 6th
item.description:
Rubber Duck was in a Kenworth, hauling logs.
He was accompanied by his friends, who were driving a cabover Peterbuilt with a refrigerated trailer...
.... and a GMC truck with a trailer full of hogs.
They started off on Interstate 10 about a mile out of Los Angeles headed west when they began having some difficulties with the police. Gradually, more and more trucks joined their truckin' parade and became a part of their convoy.
As they reached Tulsa, Oklahoma, their number had swelled to 85 trucks. The police presence grew as roadblocks and even police helicopters joined the opposition.
By the time they had reached Chicago, the police were joined by tanks and armored cars from the Illinois National Guard attempting to stop the convoy, which by now had grown to a thousand trucks...
... and eleven long-haired Friends of Jesus in a chartreuse Volkswagen Microbus.
The truckers continued on toward New Jersey (perhaps driving on the boardwalk as pictured above, perhaps not) and ran through the toll booths at 98 mph without paying. According to the legend, this was the end of their quest, for now. Their tale was almost at an end. Somehow in the mad scramble to cross the toll bridge, the GMC hog truck ended up in Omaha, where the hogs found themselves a home. And as for Rubber Duck... there are those who say he is still driving to this very day, relentlessly leading his convoy across the U.S.A.
The events described here come from the C.W. McCall song "Convoy" which differed substantially from the movie of the same title, and even differed from the movie version of the song. This was more of a novelty trucker song, while the movie version tracked more with the events of the movie. The opening lyrics of the radio version: "It was the dark of the moon On the sixth of June In a Kenworth, pullin' logs" I always listen to this song on June 6th, and I thought I'd share with my Imgurian friends. Here it is so you can listen along: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j3VN54M1OXA Happy Convoy Day, Imgur! Keep the bugs off your glass and the bears off your... tail. Over and out.
item.dc:creator: JohnBigboote74

item.title: Pool Party Caitlyn cosplay from League of Legends
item.description:
My pool party Caitlyn cosplay from League of Legends! I 3D printed and painted the prop myself!
Tried to recreate the splash art as close as I could!
Photos by Cam Rice
Process for how I made the prop is up on my other socials if you are interested :)
Pool Party Caitlyn splash art
I think I got pretty close to the real thing, the only detail I missed is I didn't have time to paint my nails

item.title: Good Boss
item.dc:creator: Kyzyl

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1373 (night mayor)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Oh boy! I love you too! (x 10) Good boy! Thank you." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
